message:
test(queue+capability): add hostcall queue reset/fallback tests, typed-op alias mapping, and security scenario refinements

**Hostcall queue tests (src/hostcall_queue.rs):**
- drive_signal_quality_fallback(): helper that pushes 96 items to force
  signal quality degradation and trigger S3 FIFO fallback
- queue_clear_resets_s3fifo_fallback_and_counters: validates that clear()
  properly resets fallback state, contention counters, and Bravo bias mode
  so subsequent enqueues resume on the fast path

**Capability policy typed-op alias mapping (tests/capability_policy_scoped.rs):**
- events_aliases_across_op_method_name_keys_map_to_events: validates that
  events method resolution works across op/method/name parameter keys
  including whitespace trimming and case-insensitive matching
- session_aliases_across_op_method_name_keys_map_to_session: same for
  session-scoped operations
- unsupported_event_session_ops_do_not_escalate: verifies that unknown
  operation names within events/session methods don't escalate to higher
  capability requirements

**Security scenario refinements (tests/e2e_security_scenario_sec66.rs):**
- Formatting and assertion refinements in Scenario 12 composed filters

**Beads tracker (issues.jsonl):**
- Minor sync of concurrent task state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -932,7 +932,129 @@ mod method_capability_mapping {
 }
 
 // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-// 8. Dispatch validation edge cases
+// 8. Events/session typed-op alias mapping invariants
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+
+mod typed_method_alias_mapping {
+    use super::*;
+
+    fn alias_call(method: &str, params: serde_json::Value) -> HostCallPayload {
+        make_call("typed-alias", method, method, params)
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn events_aliases_across_op_method_name_keys_map_to_events() {
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "events",
+                json!({ "op": " get_active_tools " })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("events")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "events",
+                json!({ "method": "set-model" })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("events")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "events",
+                json!({ "name": "register command" })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("events")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                " EVENTS ",
+                json!({ "op": "append.entry" })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("events")
+        );
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn session_aliases_across_op_method_name_keys_map_to_session() {
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call("session", json!({ "op": "get_model" })))
+                .as_deref(),
+            Some("session")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "session",
+                json!({ "method": "set-thinking_level" })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("session")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "session",
+                json!({ "name": "set label" })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("session")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                " SESSION ",
+                json!({ "op": " get-file " })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("session")
+        );
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn typed_alias_matching_is_ascii_folded_and_punctuation_insensitive() {
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "events",
+                json!({ "op": " LiSt.FlAgS " })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("events")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "session",
+                json!({ "op": " SET_thinking-level " })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("session")
+        );
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn unsupported_event_session_ops_do_not_escalate_and_unknown_method_fails_closed() {
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call(
+                "events",
+                json!({ "op": "launch_shell" })
+            ))
+            .as_deref(),
+            Some("events")
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call("session", json!({ "op": "exec" })))
+                .as_deref(),
+            Some("session")
+        );
+        assert!(
+            required_capability_for_host_call(&alias_call("mystery", json!({ "op": "get_model" })))
+                .is_none()
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
+// 9. Dispatch validation edge cases
 // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
 
 mod dispatch_validation {
